full_description: Daily Workout is a fitness app that provides users with a variety of exercises and workout routines. It allows users to track their progress and set fitness goals. With Daily Workout, you can choose from different types of workouts such as cardio, strength training, and yoga. The app also includes a library of exercises with step-by-step instructions and videos. You can create a customized workout plan based on your fitness level and goals. The app tracks your progress, including the number of workouts completed, calories burned, and weight lost. You can also set reminders and notifications to stay motivated and on track. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced athlete, Daily Workout is the perfect app to help you achieve your fitness goals.
